description: Examples-as-context for spec-plan trigger and boundary coverage. They are not a deterministic router.

cases.expected_outcome: Run the planning workflow and produce a durable plan without editing implementation code.

cases.input: Deepen docs/plans/example-plan.md with implementation risks and source evidence.
cases.expected_outcome: Run a plan deepening pass against the existing plan artifact.

cases.input: Implement docs/plans/example-plan.md now and run the tests.
cases.expected_outcome: Route execution-ready implementation to spec-work rather than continuing in planning.
cases.boundary_note: spec-plan defines HOW; spec-work executes code and tests.

cases.input: This Jest test is failing with a stack trace; find the root cause and fix it.
cases.expected_outcome: Route the failure investigation to spec-debug.
cases.boundary_note: Bug reproduction and root-cause tracing are debug work, not implementation planning.

cases.input: Review this plan for gaps and risks, but do not rewrite or execute it.
cases.expected_outcome: Route independent plan review to spec-doc-review.
cases.boundary_note: Review-only requests should not silently become planning or implementation.
